data.title: Tether has frozen 3.29 million USDT in the Rhea Finance hacker's address.
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino posted on X that Tether has frozen 3.29 million USDT in the Rhea Finance hacker's address. Ardoino specifically mentioned that "Tether takes this matter seriously," seemingly implying that Circle has failed to restrict hackers from using USDC to transfer illicit funds in recent incidents such as Drift.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Drift: Receives support from Tether and others to establish a $147.5 million recovery pool for user compensation; 2. Iranian media: Iran plans to pay transit fees for the Strait of Hormuz through Iranian banks; 3. Claude Opus 4.7 is now available; 4. CertiK: Rhea Finance suffers $7.6 million loss in attack; 5. Uniswap developer platform officially launched; 6. Kalshi regulatory controversy escalates, potentially reaching the US Supreme Court; 7. Sources: US and Iran reduce ambitions for a comprehensive peace agreement, seeking instead a temporary agreement; 8. Charles Schwab officially launches spot cryptocurrency trading service; 9. Hyperbridge: Vulnerability loss estimated at $237,000 increased to $2.5 million, some funds transferred to Binance; 10. Bless project team transfers 300 million BLESS tokens, 200 million to CEX, and 100 million sold on BSC.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Open Lower; Tech Companies Surge on Debut
data.description: Hong Kong's stock market opened with declines today, as the Hang Seng Index fell by 0.69% and the Hang Seng Tech Index dropped by 0.72%. According to Jin10, two tech companies made significant gains on their first day of trading. Qunhe Technology (00068.HK) surged by 171.65%, while Changguang Chenxin (03277.HK) rose by 80.54%.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Addresses Concerns Over Energy Prices Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump addressed voter concerns regarding rising energy prices, describing the ongoing conflict in Iran as "a little diversion." Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Trump's efforts to reassure the public amid geopolitical tensions. The President's remarks come as energy markets react to the situation in the Middle East, with potential implications for global oil supply and prices. Trump's comments aim to mitigate fears of prolonged economic impact due to the conflict.

data.title: The US government transferred approximately $606,000 worth of BTC to Coinbase Prime.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, a U.S. government address has transferred approximately $606,000 worth of Bitcoin to Coinbase Prime. This asset originated from funds seized during the investigation of Bitfinex hacker Ilya Lichtenstein, and it is currently unclear whether it will be sold.

data.title: ORDI broke through $10.7, surging over 190% intraday.
data.description: OKX data shows that ORDI has broken through $10.76 and is currently trading at $10.3, with a daily increase of over 190%.

data.title: An address purchased 590,900 HYPE tokens from Galaxy OTC, bringing the total holdings of related addresses to 4.11 million tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, one address purchased 590,900 HYPE tokens from the Galaxy Digital OTC wallet, worth approximately $25.92 million. On-chain data shows that another set of six addresses, possibly belonging to the same entity, holds a total of 4,114,234 HYPE tokens, worth approximately $181 million, all from Galaxy OTC channels.

data.title: Bitwise Launches Avalanche ETF on NYSE Amid Metaplanet's BTC Expansion
data.description:
Bitwise Asset Management has announced the launch of the Bitwise Avalanche ETF (NYSE: $BAVA) on the New York Stock Exchange, marking the first U.S. ETF to integrate on-chain staking for Avalanche. According to ChainCatcher, the fund aims for an annual staking yield of 5.4% with a management fee of 0.34%, waiving fees for the first $500 million in assets for the initial month.

In related developments, Metaplanet Inc. has initiated the exercise of its 27th batch of warrants for EVO FUND as part of its strategy to expand its Bitcoin reserves. The company previously disclosed the acquisition of 5,075 BTC on April 2, increasing its total holdings to 40,177 BTC, surpassing MARA Holdings to become the third-largest publicly traded company in terms of Bitcoin holdings. Metaplanet's long-term goal is to hold 100,000 BTC by the end of 2026.

data.title: The Tennessee Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act will hold a hearing on April 20.
data.description: The Tennessee Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act will have a hearing before the Senate Finance Committee on April 20, further advancing the legislative process. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: US stocks closed higher across the board in the crypto sector, with MARA rising over 10.32%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.24%, the S&P 500 rose 0.26%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.36%. The crypto sector collectively strengthened, with MARA rising over 10.32%, ABTC up 2.73%, SBET up 2.25%, COIN up 2%, and MSTR up 3.76%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 44.00, a daily decrease of 3.02%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 65.46, a daily decrease of 1.04%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate is unchanged, currently at 6.82084. The USD/JPY exchange rate is up 0.06%, currently at 159.249. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.44% to 5,921.29 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.15% to 10,600.17 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 0.30% to 24,195.14 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 0.11% to $93.47 per barrel, while Brent crude oil remained unchanged at $99.84 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Praises Treasury Secretary Besent's Impact on Market Stability
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently expressed high praise for Treasury Secretary Besent, highlighting his ability to calm the markets. According to BlockBeats, Trump noted that Besent's role is challenging, yet his speeches tend to stabilize market conditions. In contrast, Trump acknowledged that his own remarks can sometimes cause market tension, jokingly suggesting that he occasionally asks Besent to manage the situation for him.

data.title: XRP Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows on April 16
data.description:
On April 16, XRP spot ETFs experienced notable inflows, according to ChainCatcher. Data from SoSoValue indicates that the total net inflow for XRP spot ETFs reached $11.865 million on that day.

The Bitwise XRP ETF led with a single-day net inflow of $7.159 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $406 million. Following this, the Franklin XRP ETF saw a net inflow of $3.1603 million, with its historical total reaching $341 million.

As of the latest update, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs stands at $1.078 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.21%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $1.261 billion.

data.title: New Wallet Deposits $7.45 Million USDC to HyperLiquid
data.description: A newly created wallet has deposited $7.45 million in USDC to HyperLiquid, purchasing 169,800 HYPE at a price of $43.86 each. According to ChainCatcher, 10,000 HYPE from this transaction have been transferred for staking.

data.title: BlackRock withdrew 3,899 BTC and 839 ETH from Coinbase, worth approximately $292 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, BlackRock-related addresses withdrew 3,899 BTC and 839 ETH from Coinbase, totaling approximately $292 million.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $11.8656 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 16th, Eastern Time), XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $11.8656 million. The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a net inflow of $7.159 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $406 million. The second largest was the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a net inflow of $3.1603 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $341 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.078 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.21%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.261 billion.

data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $15.5003 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $15.5003 million yesterday (April 16th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) saw net inflows yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $15.5003 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $808 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF's total net asset value is $892 million, with an SOL net asset value ratio of 1.73%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $997 million.

data.title: Bitcoin's Controversial Rally Challenges Market Cycles
data.description: Bitcoin is experiencing one of its most questioned upward trends, according to PANews. Taiki Maeda provides an in-depth analysis of how Bitcoin is breaking the traditional four-year cycle and climbing the 'wall of worry.' The discussion also explores how the perpetual buying pressure from figures like Saylor and STRC is reshaping market dynamics.

data.title: The Kalshi regulatory controversy is escalating and may ultimately reach the U.S. Supreme Court.
data.description: The U.S. Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals has held oral arguments in a dispute between Kalshi and the state of Nevada over regulatory authority over prediction markets, and the legal community expects the case to ultimately go to the U.S. Supreme Court for a ruling. The crux of the dispute is whether the event contracts offered by Kalshi fall under the category of "swaps" regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). Nevada argues that it requires a gambling license to operate, while Kalshi maintains that state-level gambling regulations should not apply. Previously, a federal court in Arizona blocked the state from taking action against Kalshi under gambling laws. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Polymarket Predicts Orlando Magic's Playoff Chances Drop
data.description:
The probability of the Orlando Magic advancing to the NBA playoffs has decreased to 39% on Polymarket, marking a 30% decline over the past 24 hours. According to Odaily, the Magic recently lost to the Philadelphia 76ers with a score of 97-109 and are set to compete against the Charlotte Hornets for the final Eastern Conference playoff spot.

In related news, Charlotte Hornets star LaMelo Ball was fined $35,000 for pulling Bam Adebayo during a game against the Miami Heat, resulting in a flagrant foul penalty two. However, he was not suspended. Additionally, Ball received a $25,000 fine for using profanity during a post-game interview, bringing his total fines to $60,000.
